user_feedback: in level 6, the monster on the right is also too close to the key, can you apply the same treatment where you have the key farther away from the monster  and closer to the middle of the level and have the monsters path be large so that there is a window to collect the key in level six
analysis:
- Issue identified: In Level 6, the right-side monster is positioned too close to the objective (`obj6_2`), making it difficult to collect without taking damage immediately. The player needs a fair "window of opportunity".
- Files affected: `levels.js`
- Changes needed:
  1.  In `createLevel6`, move `obj6_2` from `(496, 48)` to `(440, 290)`. This places it closer to the "middle" (left side of the right room) and farther from the monster's initial position.
  2.  Update the right-side Ao Oni's patrol path to be much larger. Instead of a small loop at the top, it will patrol a large vertical rectangle on the far right side of the room (`x: 480-550`, `y: 60-340`). This creates time windows where the monster is far away (at the top) for the player to safely collect the key (at the bottom left of the room).
